# Harry Corner — Premium Kitchen Tools E-Commerce

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js 16.2.10 (App Router)
- **Language:** JavaScript (JSX)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4 + CSS Modules
- **Animation:** Framer Motion
- **3D:** React Three Fiber / Three.js
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **E-Commerce:** Static product catalog (no external API)
- **Fonts:** Playfair Display, Montserrat (via next/font)
- **Deployment:** Netlify (via GitHub)

## Project Structure
```
src/
  app/              # Next.js App Router pages
    layout.js       # Root layout — metadata, JSON-LD, fonts
    page.js         # Homepage: hero, products, about, reviews, newsletter
    page.module.css # Homepage styles
    globals.css     # Global styles, CSS variables, utility classes
    sitemap.js      # Dynamic sitemap.xml
    robots.js       # robots.txt
    opengraph-image.js  # Dynamic OG image (1200×630)
  components/
    Header.js       # Navigation bar with logo + links
    Products.js     # Product grid (static data from utils/products.js)
    AboutUs.js      # Brand story section
    Reviews.js      # Customer testimonials
    NewsletterSignup.js  # Email capture form
    ThreeCanvas.js  # 3D scene (React Three Fiber)
  utils/
public/
  lifestyle_bg.png  # Hero background image
```

## Key Features
- **Server Components** by default (App Router)
- **"use client"** only where interactivity needed (Header, Products, Newsletter)
- **JSON-LD Structured Data:** Organization, WebSite, Product schemas
- **Full SEO:** metadataBase, title.template, OG image, Twitter cards, sitemap, robots
- **Newsletter Signup:** Client-side form component (needs email service integration)

## SEO Metadata (src/app/layout.js)
- `metadataBase`: https://www.harrycorner.com
- Open Graph + Twitter card images via `/opengraph-image.png`
- JSON-LD: Organization + WebSite in root layout
- Product JSON-LD each product card (src/components/Products.js)

## Current URLs (need updating on deploy)
- Canonical: `https://www.harrycorner.com`
- Sitemap: `https://www.harrycorner.com`
- Social links placeholder: `instagram.com/harrycorner`, `tiktok.com/@harrycorner`, `pinterest.com/harrycorner`
